title: Neea stellulata
taxonomy: Neea stellulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Neea, which contains several species of shrubs and small trees. The plant is native to Central and South America, where it can be found growing in tropical regions. Neea stellulata is a relatively understudied species, but it is known to produce small white flowers and dark green, glossy leaves. The plant's classification reflects its close relationships with other members of the Melastomataceae family.
